toPartialEquiv✝ : PartialEquiv (TotalSpace F E) (B × F)
open_target✝ : IsOpen toPartialEquiv✝.target
baseSet✝ : Set B
open_baseSet✝ : IsOpen baseSet✝
source_eq✝ : toPartialEquiv✝.source = TotalSpace.proj ⁻¹' baseSet✝
target_eq✝ : toPartialEquiv✝.target = baseSet✝ ×ˢ univ
proj_toFun✝ : ∀ p ∈ toPartialEquiv✝.source, (↑toPartialEquiv✝ p).1 = p.proj
hb :
  b ∈
    { toPartialEquiv := toPartialEquiv✝, open_target := open_target✝, baseSet := baseSet✝,
        open_baseSet := open_baseSet✝, source_eq := source_eq✝, target_eq := target_eq✝,
        proj_toFun := proj_toFun✝ }.baseSet
⊢ ↑{ toPartialEquiv := toPartialEquiv✝, open_target := open_target✝, baseSet := baseSet✝, open_baseSet := open_baseSet✝,
          source_eq := source_eq✝, target_eq := target_eq✝, proj_toFun := proj_toFun✝ }
      { proj := b,

R : Type u

T : Type w
A : Type z
a b : R
n✝ : ℕ
inst✝ : Ring R
p q : R[X]

n : ℕ
hn : q.degree ≤ ↑n
a✝ : Nontrivial R
⊢ (if hq : q.Monic then
      (if h : q.degree ≤ p.degree ∧ p ≠ 0 then
          let z := C p.leadingCoeff * X ^ (p.natDegree - q.natDegree);
          let_fun _wf := ⋯;
          let dm := (p - q * z).divModByMonicAux hq;
          (z + dm.1, dm.2)
        else (0, p)).2
    else p) =
    ∑ x : Fin n,
      (monomial ↑x)
        ((if hq : q.Monic then
              (if h : q.degree ≤ p.degree ∧ p ≠ 0 then
                  let z := C p.leadingCoeff * X ^ (p.natDegree - q.natDegree);
                  let_fun _wf := ⋯;
                  let dm := (p - q * z).divModByMonicAux hq;
                  (z + dm.1, dm.2)
                else (0, p)).2
            else p).coeff
          ↑x)
